title: Medicaid Work Requirements
featuredImageAlt: A young woman sitting in a wheelchair facing away from the camera
body: “The Cruelty of Medicaid Work Requirements” appeared in TIME in February 2025. The Republicans have sworn that work requirements won’t affect people like my daughter. They’re wrong. Read the essay at [https://time.com/7260543/medicaid-work-requirements-disability-essay/](https://time.com/7260543/medicaid-work-requirements-disability-essay/)
